arts.ttl: Swedish talent waiting for Manchester City offer as he gets ready to move
arts.sum: Swedish talent Matias Siltanen is close to a move to Djurgården but is also hoping for an offer to Manchester City to arrive before he makes it. That’s according to Fotboll Skanalen, who cover comments from the 17-year-old today as he gets ready to move.
